hero.label: Made for Surface Labs
hero.headline: I want to help Surface turn website intent into pipeline.
hero.subheadline: Surface Labs is tackling a problem I find genuinely exciting: helping B2B teams convert anonymous website traffic into revenue with AI. The SDR role stands out to me because your product already drives real pipeline, and joining now means contributing at a moment when growth, customer feedback, and outbound execution all matter.

whyCompany.title: AI that connects website traffic directly to revenue
whyCompany.body: What stands out to me is that Surface is not just another AI tool. You are building a Lead Operations Center for B2B marketing teams, with AI agents already processing 50K plus leads monthly and helping generate more than $40M in inbound pipeline. That makes the value proposition concrete and exciting to sell.

whyCompany.title: Strong traction at an early, high-leverage stage
whyCompany.body: The timing is especially compelling because Surface is still a small team, but the signals are strong. Backing from YC, Garry Tan, and Dharmesh Shah, plus recent team growth and 70% product growth in the last month, suggests a company entering a fast execution phase where an SDR can make a visible impact.

whyCompany.title: I have relevant BDR and marketing experience
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai, I worked outbound through cold outreach, LinkedIn sequencing, and HubSpot, helping acquire 15 to 20 paying clients. At NextAfter, I saw how messaging, digital strategy, and conversion thinking affect pipeline quality, which feels highly relevant for a company focused on turning website visitors into qualified revenue opportunities.

quote: I want this role because Surface is solving a real revenue problem, not just shipping AI for the sake of AI. I would be excited to help start conversations with marketers who already have intent signals in front of them and show them a better way to turn that attention into pipeline.
